message: Hey team!:rocket: Can you believe it's been 8 fantastic years for Online Boutique?
Before we dive into anniversary celebrations, let's give a warm welcome to Maya, our new Security Analyst. She's got 5 years of cybersecurity expertise under her belt! :clap:
Hi everyone! :raised_hand_with_fingers_splayed: Thrilled to be here, especially on such a special occasion. Let's make Online Boutique even successful and secure together!
Welcome, Maya! Your experience will elevate our cybersecurity efforts.
Excited to have you, Maya! Bez has been very excited to have you on the team.
Impressive! Eager to learn from you, Maya.
:+1: Welcome Maya, pleasure meeting you.
Hi Maya! Your experience is top-notch. Cheers to you and to Online Boutique's 8-year anniversary! :partying_face: :tada:
Thanks for the warm welcome! Excited for the celebration and our anniversary party.

Welcome to The Switch, the responsibility is on you to size up the problem.

 *Access game links by pressing the Uptime Labs Logo in the top right of the screen*
 *Use `/incident` to create an incident record*

Once you're ready just click start to begin
We are all so glad you have joined us Maya
Hold on, team. Quick check-in. Is anyone else experiencing internet problems or slow connectivity?
Internet's definitely sluggish, was loading up github and it took ages to load
Perhaps it could be due to the increase of sales we have been having with this anniversary sale?
Hey team, we've seen some weird traffic from our data centre network in the last couple of days, it's been mostly minor but never as bad compared to now although
Hamed and I will have been monitoring outbound traffic. Checking for anomalies again.
I will try to place an order and check the platform.
Just ran a test on my internet speed.
im able to place an order
:star: Attempt to replicate the issue
Managed to place an order without any issues. Anyone else?
Can't access anything at the moment. Everything's taking too long to load
@bob  is there any issue noticed so far from customers perspective?
:star: Asking questions to validate impact of the problem
Gathering customer reports now
Could be related to our anniversary sale?
Reports from as far back as two weeks mention slow site performance and timeouts
@shay can i get the list of chages that recently went through?
:star: Check changes done to the platform
Some customers are placing orders without issues, while others report long load times
Issues reported by customers are widespread, not limited to any specific region
Sure!

Hope this helps
https://uptime-labs.atlassian.net/wiki/external/NGRkNTNhZDVjZDUyNDU5NDk2Yjg3NzcxMTE1YjkxOTA
@tanya can we check the load performace for the platform?
This could be intermitten issue
Do we have any POC for that please?
checking
*Incident Number INC100011:* sev3 Issues with late loading of site and placing orders
Just a wild guess
Noticing a spike in outbound connections. The IP range affected is the same as our frontend and payments.
Hello @bez , We are looking into this issue, so far the issue is not widespread amongst customers. will update you
:star: Qualify the problem
Do we know if this has affected our sales in any way?
@daniel you were saying something?
You were asking about POC, I just assumed that this issue was intermittent.
@tanya @shay can you both check if this has anything to do with the changes done recently on paymentServices and frontend?
:star: Reviewed changes
@bob is this affecting our sales?
Checking that now
I will check the frontend changes
Sales are lower compared to the previous month by 9%
off by 9% since last month
@hamed Do we know any point of contact for load issues? can we involve them here please
:star: Escalating when required
Both deployments to payments and frontend look clean, nothing stands out, and doesn't look like they would affect the network logistics
Hey, I will reach out to @maya for network and security
Are the customers aware of this issue? Have we made any statements yet?
@maya Can you help us out here ? Seems like this is a network issue ? Can we please check? @tanya can help you with the affected services
:star: Form an effective investigation team
Understood, I will start our investigation right away!
Checking the spike from traffic, this could be just from sales
Better safe than sorry
@bob Can we inform the customers about an ongoing network issue? Adn that we are fixing it ASAP
Logs don't show anything for services
not yet, but on it
Doesn't appear to be application level issue
I will put a message out and notify about the maintenance
@daniel can you help out Tanya to check out the spike in trafific?
Security scan shows issues related to our network switch. Working on identifying the exact cause
@Tanya and @Hamed, need your assistance in a detailed review
Sure, you never know what extra attention can attract
@Tanya @hamed can you help her out please?
Found a critical issue. Our network switch was compromised due to unpatched vulnerabilities, leading to a BotNet creating DDOS attacks
The network switch's vulnerabilities were exploited. We need to address this immediately
The disruption affects both our internal and external users
That makes sense why some internal users are being affected
*Incident Number INC100083:* sev1 Issue is exposure of vulnerablities and DDOS
Suggesting a switch restart!
What would be the impact on our customers?
it is a DDOS attack, fixing it imediately
Okay, keep me in the loop for this!
@maya what is the Plan to get this sorted? do you need resources?
:star: Take command
:star: Manage actions and timings
I will work with hamed on this
Can we get an ETa?
Restart may take the switch down completely
I will see what we can and give you an ETA in next 5 mins
Your right restarting the switch isnt the best option as it might intruduce some more issues
Trying to think of another solution but i'm not too familiar with the network infrastructure here at OB
No worries Maya I can send over the graph of the network infra if you wanna look at it
That would be perfect @hamed
Looking at the diagram now, will need a moment to figure out what to do next
Let me know if you have any suggestions in the mean time
We have a redundant switch; we could failover to it!
@maya what does this mean in terms of downtime for the customers, or the impact overall?
There would be short downtime, about 2-3 mins and some spike issues before the load balancer picks up on the traffic
@hamed is this a good idesa?
Checking if this switch is online and patched!
@bob is that acceptable? @hamed need your input here
Seems like it's operational and doesn't have the same issues as the current one
I will put a 15 min maintance banner and that should account for a short downtime
We should go ahead with the failover then. Please proceed
:star: Restoration over root cause analysis
Understood!
Preparing to bypass the infected switch
attempting a fix
Should we communicate anything else to customers?
No impact observed on the redundant switch. Successfully bypassed the infected switch
the infected switch has been successfully changed over
The Catalyst 9300 Series which is our infected switch has been swapped over to old but reliable (Cisco Catalyst 2960 Series)
Good job, can we confirm @shreya.rao-ig.com?
the attack @maya what damage did it cause to customers?
@shay cna you check the internet speed again?
:star: Cross checking resolution with team
Initial diagnosis has determined no data leakage, just a degraded customer experience
@bob can you check if the customers are reporting normalcy?
:star: Cross check resolution with stakeholders
Checking the site now
I will take a banner down and check reports now
Speed is back up
Reports are slowly going down!
great, waiting for your confirmation @Bob
thats great!
good job
Issue is resolved, reports for slow browsing have gone down
Cheers, everyone! Resolving these network issues added a bit of spice to our celebration
Good job team! We managed to keep the anniversary vibe alive despite the detour.
:star: Confirm resolution with the business
High-fives all around!  I will take out that faulty switch as soon as possible.
The website's performance is looking solid again
The anniversary orders are flowing smoothly now. No hiccups on the code side.
Our customers are back to enjoying the celebration. Happy customers, happy anniversary!
Really great job @shreya.rao-ig.com.
Special congratulations to our Incident Manager for steering the ship with finesse and to Maya for your help identifying the faulty switch. Cheers to a remarkable team! :tada:
great job all
